title: Customising the Time Tracking Feature
excerpt: Hi All, I was wondering who else would like to customise the time tracking feature where you can add a quick description about the time spent on a product? I know I can add it in the conversation, but to put it with the …

posts.author: nicole1 (Nicole Bouchet)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi All, I was wondering who else would like to customise the time tracking feature where you can add a quick description about the time spent on a product? I know I can add it in the conversation, but to put it with the time tracking would be great! eg. I might spend a total of 10 hours on a product over a month but would like to be able to say I spent one hour on day x updating licence info, 2 hours on day y creating mock ups, 3 hours on day z updating changes… Thanks

posts.author: MikeD (mikedoughty)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes I definitely would find this necessary and useful.
